description: A MOLLE placard with a pair of buckles.  Can attach to a harness to form a wearable chest rig.  Alternatively, it could be attached to plate carrier to serve as space for more pouches.

variants.description: A MOLLE placard with a pair of buckles.  Can be combined with a harness to make a compact, minimal chest rig.  It can also be worn on some plate carriers via the QASM interface, as a replaceable alternative to a predefined PALS webbing or a set of pockets.  <variant:multicam>

description: A compact chest rig chassis with a pair of buckles.  Features four rifle magazine pouches, four pistol magazine pouches, and a general pouch for small supplies.  Can attach to a harness to form a wearable chest rig.  Alternatively, it could be attached to a plate carrier to serve as a set of extra pouches.

description: A placard with a pair of buckles.  Holds three individual rifle magazines.  Can attach to a harness to form a wearable chest rig.  Alternatively, it could be attached to a plate carrier to serve as magazine carry.

variants.description: A placard with three rifle-magazine pouches, augmented by a pair of buckles.  Can be combined with a harness to make a compact, minimal chest rig.  It can also be worn on some plate carriers via the QASM interface, as a replaceable alternative sewn-in magazine pockets.  <variant:multicam>

description: A chest rig chassis with PALS webbing and several rifle-magazine pouches, supported by a pair of buckles.  Each side also has two flat pockets for intelligence items, such as maps or documents.  Can attach to a harness to form a wearable chest rig.  Alternatively, it could be attached to a plate carrier to serve as a combination of magazine carry and additional space for pouches.

variants.description: A slim chassis, split into two by a zipper.  Four rifle-magazine pockets can fit a pair each.  Pockets inside each side could be used to store flat objects like maps, notes, and IDs.  The chassis also features plenty of PALS webbing.  <variant:multicam>

A slim chassis, split into two by a zipper.  Four rifle-magazine pockets can fit a pair each.  Pockets inside each side could be used to store flat objects like maps, notes, and IDs.  The chassis also features plenty of PALS webbing.  This one features a custom paint job, turning the rig into a representation of all things American: the flag, a bald eagle, fireworks, and loose rounds of .50 BMG.

description: A compact chest rig chassis with two rifle-magazine pouches, one pistol-magazine pouch, a medium-sized general pouch, and some PALS webbing for additional pouches.  Limited in capacity, but unencumbering.

variants.description: A compact chassis meant to form an unencumbering, if not capacity-heavy, chest rig.  The general pouch at the front is coupled with an insert pocket at the back and external PALS webbing.  The insert pocket is filled with three inserts: two for a rifle magazine each, and one for a pistol magazine or a utility item, such as a multitool.  <variant:multicam>

A compact chassis meant to form an unencumbering, if not capacity-heavy, chest rig.  The general pouch at the front is coupled with an insert pocket at the back and external PALS webbing.  The insert pocket is filled with three inserts: two for a rifle magazine each, and one for a pistol magazine or a utility item, such as a multitool.  <variant:coyote>

A compact chassis meant to form an unencumbering, if not capacity-heavy, chest rig.  The general pouch at the front is coupled with an insert pocket at the back and external PALS webbing.  The insert pocket is filled with three inserts: two for a rifle magazine each, and one for a pistol magazine or a utility item, such as a multitool.  <variant:olive>

A compact chassis meant to form an unencumbering, if not capacity-heavy, chest rig.  The general pouch at the front is coupled with an insert pocket at the back and external PALS webbing.  The insert pocket is filled with three inserts: two for a rifle magazine each, and one for a pistol magazine or a utility item, such as a multitool.  <variant:black>

description: A large, comfortable chest rig chassis with plenty of PALS webbing.  It has four rifle magazine pouches, each fitting up to two STANAG magazines, as well as with two spacious side pouches and a bib that offers some extra webbing.

variants.description: A large chassis with plenty of PALS webbing.  Much of the rig is padded on the inside, making wearing it more comfortable.  The rig has four rifle magazine pouches, each fitting up to two STANAG magazines, as well as two spacious side pouches and a bib that offers some extra storage and webbing.  <variant:coyote>
